description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a thick, cylindrical handle and a large, rectangular double-faced head. The head features a textured, studded surface on both striking faces, likely designed to maximize impact and reduce slippage during use. The handle is straight and appears to be made from a dense, solid material, providing durability and strength for repeated heavy impacts. The entire hammer is a dark, matte color, suggesting it is constructed primarily from metal, possibly steel, with a slightly rough finish. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian, industrial appearance. The hammer shows no signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A heavy, dark-colored sledgehammer with a studded, double-faced rectangular head and a straight, solid handle. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with a rough, matte finish.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed from the narrow side, showing the studded face of the head and the straight handle extending downward.
description_view_1: The hammer is seen from the broad side, clearly displaying the full width of the double-faced, rectangular head and the length of the handle.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view highlights the opposite studded face of the head and the straight handle.
description_view_3: This view matches view 1, showing the broad, rectangular head and the full handle from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight steel handle with a rough, textured surface for grip enhancement.
attribute_head_type: Double-faced sledgehammer head with rectangular, studded striking faces on both sides.
